horoscope: Transits can bring some tense energies, dear Aries, but also offer you a chance to explore your deeper feelings on a matter. While intensity can be passionate at times, it can be problematic right now. Extremes are tempting with an all-or-nothing aspect, Venus opposite Pluto. Your need for guilt-free personal enjoyment is high, and taking time for play can also be healing these days. Social pleasures are in special focus. However,  don’t let complicated friendships take so much of your time that you barely get a chance to relax and enjoy yourself. Consider that your initial reactions to environmental stressors can reveal fears, insecurities, or resentments lurking just beneath the surface.

A warm, trusting approach comes naturally as you begin the day, dear Taurus, but as the day advances, you might experience an inner conflict, likely about life-work balance, or tension in a relationship. Either way, what triggers you now can be highly revealing. Today’s Venus-Pluto opposition is complicated. With this influence, you can be concerned about losing a position or value in someone’s eyes. While you might need to deal with pressures from competition, you also need some peace to bring the best version of yourself to your practical affairs and responsibilities. A compromise seems your best bet. It can be challenging to shake particular frustrations or worries, but you might choose to channel your energy into working on vulnerable areas instead. Drawing up plans for the future can be in the spotlight and quite successful later, once you're feeling more productive.

While you're in a dreamy mood as the day begins, dear Gemini, it may be best to avoid bringing up tricky topics, as some tension can be rising. Consider that people may be feeling things through their insecurities. Venus forms an opposition to Pluto, challenging your sense of what you value and bringing buried feelings to a head. Ideally, this discomfort can motivate you to seek new and rewarding channels for making connections. Clashing with someone is possible, and since this transit occurs along your communications axis, you might take differences in opinion very seriously right now. This might happen inside you, and you could remember and dwell on something communicated in the past. Consider that attempts to over-manage your life can only lead to stress. It may be better to acknowledge fears and concerns and avoid allowing them to drive your behavior.

There can be discoveries and conclusions that come almost as if by magic this week, dear Cancer, but there can be some building tension today. With a Venus-Pluto opposition, people are more sensitive than usual, and as a result, minor problems can escalate, and tension may stir conflicts. Ideally, this transit helps uncover something vital about yourself, another person, or a circumstance. If you’ve been too attached to someone or something, for example, it’s time for a test or a turning point. Events can have you questioning or examining your attachments. It’s wise to aim for moderation to find a middle ground. The day is complicated, but you also stand to learn a lot about yourself and your projects or plans.

This is a strong week for exploring your feelings and affections, dear Leo. Today, with a Venus-Pluto opposition, something could be triggering, especially in a relationship. Aim for greater understanding of both yourself and an important person in your life. With Venus in your sign, you can use your charm and personality to get a little more from life than you usually do these days, but disagreements with someone over attachments and allegiances are possible right now. Instead, intense feelings emerge that give you a stronger understanding of what’s missing in your life. If you’re getting more attention, someone may feel insecure if they fear you’re drifting away. You may feel anxious about a relationship, and worries or fears reach a boiling point. Aim to consider ways to let go of a tendency to over-manage an area of life you fear losing.

People are more sensitive to rhythms that may be off today, dear Virgo, as Venus opposes Pluto. Watch for reading a little too much into what others are saying or imagining what they might be thinking. Today is complicated, as this transit may bring frustrations to a head. You need relaxation and retreat so you can heal as Venus transits your solar twelfth house, but this aspect can aggravate your fears of falling behind or of letting someone else take the reins. Consider reaching a compromise to improve both emotional and physical health. As much as possible, avoid the tendency to obsess over, micromanage, or oversee every detail if doing so prevents you from taking the break you need.

There's been good energy for connecting, dear Libra, and this will continue. However, your feelings for someone or something can overflow as Venus opposes Pluto today. While your need for easygoing connections is high these days, the pull of intense relationships or projects is even stronger right now. You may feel drawn into something intense or complicated, but you’ll need to tap into your self-control and find ways to detach enough to unwind. Experiences prompt you to address excesses in your social life, particularly if they’re draining material or emotional resources.

You can feel strongly about your responsibilities and goals today, dear Scorpio. As the day advances, however, tension is likely, as Venus opposes Pluto. Look for clues about where you can make compromises to improve your life. This transit can pull up frustrations stemming from fears and insecurities. While you’ll be taking more pleasure in your work and life path goals, concerns about your personal life distract you today. Home or family life may be complicated, or you could feel guilty about spreading your wings. The events of the day can offer some clues as to where you may need to compartmentalize or cut down in some areas so that you don’t stress yourself out unnecessarily. Ideally, conflicts today lead to greater understanding.

It's a generally strong time for feeling spirited and enjoying yourself, dear Sagittarius, with Venus moving in harmony with your sign. However, tensions, both internal and with others, may be rising today as Venus opposes Pluto. Someone might misunderstand your opinions or take them personally, or projects you’re overseeing may keep you from getting the break you need. Watch for obsessive thinking if it’s preventing you from growing, exploring new ideas and experiences, or reaching out. Conflicts with others may start with a difference of opinion but are likely more about the fear that you’ve lost power in someone’s eyes. You need to leave your post from time to time without guilt, so attempt to reach a compromise.

You might decide to iron out tricky problems related to money or power dynamics in relationships these days, dear Capricorn, with Venus in your solar eighth house. Still, with today's Venus-Pluto opposition, it may be best to consider that people can quickly feel slighted and are easily offended. Recognize triggers now, which can be revealing. You’d be wise to watch for holding on too tightly to people, situations, and things, as this can prevent you from more fully engaging emotionally. Aim to identify areas where you may act compulsively or possessively and pledge to release some control. This transit can bring up deep feelings, and there may be a personal revelation or epiphany.

With today's Venus-Pluto opposition, wants and needs seem to be at cross-purposes to one another temporarily, dear Aquarius. With this influence, it's better not to respond habitually in ways that didn't bring you success in the past. You're in a generally strong position to enhance or develop relationships these days, and you're more inclined to make peace with people, but this transit is complicated, as worries and concerns can move in, and the tendency is to insist on "all or nothing" when you would be better off meeting someone halfway. It may be best to avoid extremes, as stubbornness or unwillingness to budge on a matter can prevent you from enjoying, learning, and improving. Choose to welcome more rewarding, self-empowering, and positive activities into your life instead.

With today's Venus-Pluto opposition, dear Pisces, it can be all too easy to lose patience with people. You might also wrestle with trust issues, but consider that some of these feelings could stem from insecurities. You may choose to wait it out, as it’s temporary, but this transit can also be highly revealing of buried problems. You might have a tough time understanding some of your deepest emotions, which can be distracting. There are great benefits and joy in your work and daily routines, so don't let insecurities prevent you from giving your all to what you love. If something touches a nerve now, it can alert you to a persistent matter you've avoided or overlooked. At the same time, pay it due attention, but avoid dwelling or allowing it to hijack your day. Aim for balance.
